postmark.Subject: Refinance — Webb Holdings Ltd.
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Large refinance for Webb Holdings Ltd. (holding entity). Property 287 Glencairn Avenue, Toronto, ON M5N 1V3, appraised $20,000,000. Loan amount: $12,000,000 (60% LTV). Existing first mortgage Royal Bank of Canada, balance $9.5M.

Exit strategy: borrower intends to sell the property at end of term.

Jonathan Ferrara
Ferrara Financial
Lic. #M16002271
